title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2014
content: In 2014, a shared vision led to the founding of INK IT Solutions in Australia. As INK IT, we weren't about fancy suits; we aimed to create a workplace that felt like a second home, where our team finds joy in their work. It was all about making the daily grind more productive and simply enjoyable.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2015-2016
content: In 2015, we decided to spread our wings and opened the doors to our very first Global Delivery Centre in India, extending our family, both onshore and offshore. By 2016, we were ready for new adventures, expanding our operations to the vibrant landscape of UAE, where we started engaging with some great customers who are still our trusted partners.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2017
content: 2017 marked our deep dive into Human Experience. It was about cultivating a team with adequate resource strength and skillsets both onshore and offshore, to provide optimal services in HXM, to our customers based in various geographies, while continuing to lift the INK IT spirit – a spirit that embodied 'us' rather than 'them.'

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2018
content: In 2018, we turned our attention to Customer Experience, welcoming more stars on-site in Australia supported with additional rockstars from our Global Delivery Centre. We opened another GDC in India to support the growing customer base.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2019
content: Then, in 2019, SAP came knocking, and we proudly embraced the partnership. CX & HX became our guiding principles, sprinkled with the magic of strong robotics process automation and early AI capabilities. We further moved on to become SAP re-sell partner, while always staying true to the down-to-earth vibe that defines INK IT.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2020
content: Fast forward to 2020 – the year of milestones. INK IT became Oracle Partners, with strong hold in PeopleSoft HCM space, we unveiled SAP pre-packaged solutions for CX and also started pursuing S/4 HANA implementation and migration capabilities. But we didn't do it solo. We created a strategic partnerships with some cool system integrators, making it more of an INK IT family affair than a business venture. 2020 – the year of milestones.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2021
content: 2021 brought a fresh wave of recognition as we became a recognised SAP Gold Partner. We expanded our global footprint with operations in Singapore and South Africa, forming a strategic collaboration with an industry leader to implement S/4 HANA. Notably, we were honoured with the implementation of Australian Payroll solutions in a prestigious Australian university. Building on this success, 2022 saw the launch of our Malaysian Global Delivery Center (CX) in Kuala Lumpur, with a near-shore delivery focus. fresh wave of recognition

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2022
content: 2022 defined growth year for INK IT, where we expanded our delivery team in Malaysia and won major support contracts in SAP CX for ANZ region. We continued to deliver successful projects in SAP HXM across the globe and initiated works in the US. growth year for INK IT,

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2023
content: 2023 was a crucial year and re-defined INK IT in many ways.  We went back to the drawing board and identified our real strengths. This resulted in re-organising our leadership and team structures. There was a lot of hiring and our stars almost doubled in headcount, going up to 250 members globally. We created some great relationships with our new engagements, became a PCOE partner for SAP. SAP also awarded us a direct vendor status for their global procurement. re-defined INK IT in many ways.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2024
content: Heading into 2024, we are prioritising the development of our S/4 HANA Public capability, with a strong focus on extending our BTP practice. Additionally, we are pioneering POCs with AI and Blockchain, with two exciting products set for release this year.INK IT Solutions presses on, imprinting a future driven by friendship, enduring humility, and a dedication to reshape workspaces into thriving environments — one partnership at a time.

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2025
content: Celebrating Excellence in 2025: SAP Celebrates Top ANZ Partners! 🏆 INK IT proudly takes center stage, winning the distinguished Partner Maturity Index Award—a testament to our global commitment to delivering measurable customer value at every step of the journey.Adding to the milestone, INK IT is now ISO27001 certified, reinforcing our dedication to innovation, trust, and information security. Celebrating Excellence in 2025: SAP Celebrates Top ANZ Partners! 🏆 Partner Maturity Index Award INK IT is now ISO27001 certified

title: Our Story - INKIT SOLUTIONS - 2026
content: Leading 2026 with Awards, Impact, and Global PresenceWe begin the year by winning SAP’s Corporate Deal of the Year Award for the TTI RISE with SAP transformation, contributing to a global panel at SAP GTM KOM, Singapore, and continuing our strong momentum with the Pipeline Award for the previous quarter. Leading 2026 with Awards, Impact, and Global Presence And our adventure continues..

title: Docusign with SAP - INKIT SOLUTIONS - What is DocuSign® with SAP ?
content: As a global reseller of DocuSign®, SAP knows first-hand the ROI its customers gain from using DocuSign® eSignature within SAP products like SAP ERP, SAP Customer Experience, SAP Fieldglass, and SAP SuccessFactors: streamlined and improved business processes, cost savings, reduced risk, enhanced compliance, and more. If you’re already a DocuSign® customer using these SAP products, you can get the full benefits right away—just have your admin enable DocuSign® in SAP and start using it today!

title: Docusign with SAP - INKIT SOLUTIONS - BUSINESS CHALLENGES
content: Using digital signatures over paper and ink signatures comes with many advantages. Don’t waste time sending your contracts in the mail. Sending documents digitally is faster and more cost-efficient. With the DocuSign® integrated with SAP systems, your clients can sign documents with any internet-enabled device. Since your documents are saved in the cloud, you and your clients can access and sign documents anytime. Your clients can sign and return documents in a few clicks. Also, your transactions are secure, enforceable, auditable, and accepted in most countries. Some of the current challenges are: No traceability and audit trail to ensure confidentiality Make Course Access Location-Independent. Documents are held independent of the systems being used. No single source of truth and visibility Hassle to print, sign and scan No integration to ERP systems

title: Intelligent Automation - INKIT SOLUTIONS - INTELLIGENT AUTOMATION
content: Intelligent automation performs activities carried out by humans and, over time, learns to do them even better. Traditional controls of rule-based automation are augmented with decision-making capabilities thanks to advances in deep learning and cognitive technology. Intelligent automation doesn’t automatically apply changes, it alerts human labor and requests modifications for future processes. Think of intelligent automation as a self-improving technology. It doesn’t need to be replaced as it ages, and it doesn’t rely on a vendor to make constant upgrades in order to improve. It allows companies to save money by lowering the time to resolution for basic tasks, and it reduces human error. Intelligent Automation (IA) is a combination of Robotic Process Automation (RPA) and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies which together inspire swift end-to-end business process automation and fast-track digital transformation. title: Robotic Process Automation - INKIT SOLUTIONS - What is Robotic Process Automation (RPA)?
content: RPA is a robotic software which creates “virtual” robots that automate repetitive, rule-driven human activities within business processes. It replicates the actions of a human being interacting with the user interface in the same way that a human would.

title: Robotic Process Automation - INKIT SOLUTIONS - Processes Every Organisation Should Automate
content: Using RPA, Bots can work across multiple IT applications to complete business process flows at any time of the day, everyday.  With 100% accuracy and no question of getting tired or bored. Bots can work 24/7 with same consistency. In every organisation, there are processes which can be automated. This results in huge productivity increase and hence allows you to concentrate on more quality work. Beside typical horizontal processes, there are other organisational activities that can fall easily under the scope of automation strategy of a company. The solution combines a powerful LMS — Litmos Training — with a robust course library — Litmos Training Content. It enables targeted learning, boosts employee experience and loyalty, and protects the brand by keeping the organisation compliant. By engaging learners right in the flow of work, Litmos solutions empower personnel with knowledge that drives a better customer experience, improving KPIs across the enterprise.

But to find one that can give you the following key benefits is a must. That’s where Litmos comes in. Reduce Expenses On Training. Make Course Access Location-Independent. Customise Courses / Training Programs. Build Efficient Educational Environments.

title: Peoplesoft-services - INKIT SOLUTIONS - PeopleSoft Pre-Built Tools
content: INKIT Solutions is committed to enhance PeopleSoft HCM to find solutions to the most common business problems. Why waste hours of your precious time in manual activities to still ending up with human errors. Our Consultants have built a number of pre-built tools to support you in moving from transactional to transformational activities. Allows users to execute more tests with greater accuracy in less time. PeopleSoft Test Framework is a great tool to run the same test repeatedly. It is easy to change variables to use the same test scenario with different test cases. For example, if I wanted to create an asset with different asset profiles, It is simply a matter of copying the test case and then changing the profile and re-running the scenario. Since PTF is upgraded with PUM releases and major upgrades, PTF will automatically be adjusted for changes that have occurred in the PeopleSoft structure for delivered functionality. The biggest benefit is the ability to identify issues with customisations and other objects that are not part of the upgrade; PTF will identify functions where changes need to be made. There are optimisation tools that are built-in to PTF to adjust for changes in upgrades. These tools make PTF more efficient and make the whole user experience more rewarding. Learn more about INKIT Solutions PTF offering. Some of the top features include: Checking for failures. Running end-to-end tests Performing regression test for SIT (System Integration Test) and UAT (User Acceptance Test) Avoid rework of correcting STP data and sending an update event to the ATO. This tool helps Reconciliation of STP for a full tax year with final event indicator. This is a three-way matching that involves checking STP data with payroll (payslip data) and also with YTD accumulator values. INKIT has developed a solution for EOFY reconciliation which will identify the issues with STP and generate the reconciliation reports for most of the STP/Payment summary categories components. The reconciliation report includes incorrect STP values, correct values for each employee, pay entity, pay group and balance group combination. This solution also has the automated process to self-fixing the incorrect STP values. Customers don’t have to run the legacy payment summary process to reconcile the STP. With INKIT’s reconciliation tool, PeopleSoft customers will avoid rework of correcting STP data and sending an update event to the ATO. Employers are responsible to send accurate payroll data to the ATO which is a compliance requirement and with our solution we can help them achieve that. Clear indication of leave movements and seamlessly be posted to GL via the existing GL interfaces. Leave liability is normally a manual or semi-automated process in most of the organisations that will not give an organisation a clear indication on leave movements i.e. leave take/accruals, on pay rate increase, employee transfer and terminations etc. Our solution gives an organisation a clear indication of leave movements that will also seamlessly be posted to GL via the existing GL interface Proven approach to change the pin numbers of elements. Customers who have upgraded from  9.2(8.9,9, 9.1) to 9.2 might have an issue in changing the GP pin number of the PS delivered and custom elements in-line with the Oracle standard (which was introduced after 9.1) because of the its complexity, therefore they might have decided to keep the old fashion pin numbers that would further lead to an issue on applying PUM image, patches etc which is an ongoing issue. We have a proven approach to change the pin numbers of elements. Avoid manual intervention in each pay period. Some of the deductions (Union, child support, overpayment recovery etc) will normally be assigned at the element assignment by payee page. It will work well for ongoing employees. However, with the casual employees where an organisation has multiple casual jobs for an employee, the deduction needs to be assigned against all the jobs (in the element assignment) and also needs manual intervention in each pay period. Our solution assigns deduction only at the primary job that will automatically be resolved against other jobs that may have enough money in that period. Automatically reinstate some of the leave balances, seniority date etc. on rehire. Automation of termination processing including various tax calculations, leave out payments, clear out leave balances etc, Also, reinstate some of the leave balances (like sick leave), seniority date etc on rehire where the employee was rehired within certain period.

title: Peoplesoft-services - INKIT SOLUTIONS - Systems Upgrade & Enhancement
content: With a delivery centre overseas, we offer a combination onshore-and-offshore resource model, to provide a cost effective service. From development to support to upgrade we have it all covered. An upgrade involves advancing the system to the most current version or release available. Oracle releases new versions of the product each year. Organisations are provided with the technology via the PeopleTools or the PeopleSoft Update Manager (PUM), to manage your upgrade. Upgrading your PeopleSoft system provides many benefits to an organisation including: Access to new functionality and technology, helping you meet your business objectives Access to the latest performance and usability enhancements, providing an improved customer experience Continued access to highest level of technical support from Oracle Lower operational costs due to removal of customisations (custom built applications that have been added on to the system) We recommend that you upgrade your system where possible but the drivers for not to upgrade are wide-ranging, with the obvious one being cost, we have a very competitive pricing model for your system support and maintenance needs. Cost is one of the many benefits. THINKING ABOUT ENHANCEMENTS AND CUSTOMISATION RENEWAL? Our key approach is to get more from standard PeopleSoft functionality. We think about resolving a business problem through the following approach: Configure the system and keep it vanilla Consider use of PeopleSoft Delivered frameworks such as Fluid Drop Zones,Page Field Composer, Activity Guides, and Notification Framework. Create Bolt-On – Lift and Shift We have addressed multiple business problems for our clients using the above approach with significant savings for the clients in terms of time and money.

title: Jobkeeper Payment - INKIT SOLUTIONS - What is JobKeeper PAYMENT?
content: Flat $1,500 per fortnight job keeper payment to employers to keep employees on staff Should your eligible employees earn less than $1,500 (before tax) per fortnight, you must pay them at least $1,500 for each fortnight to claim the JobKeeper payment Payments will be made to businesses in the first week of May, but will be backdated to March 30 For an Australian business using STP enabled PeopleSoft HCM and eligible for JobKeeper payment, INK IT Solutions has got you covered. We have built enhancements in PeopleSoft HCM payroll module that make processing the federal wage subsidy seamless.

title: Jobkeeper Payment - INKIT SOLUTIONS - Eligibility criteria for JobKeeper Payment
content: In order to receive a payment, both the employer and employee must meet the eligibility criteria Eligible employers are businesses, charities or NPOs, faced with revenue losses that cross turnover-specific thresholds, that employed at least one eligible employee on 1 March 2020. Employees who were made redundant since March 1 are still eligible for payment, provided you will re-hire them. Full Time , Part Time and casual staff who have been employed for at-least 12 months are eligible.

title: Jobkeeper Payment - INKIT SOLUTIONS - OUR APPROACH
content: Identify and enrol into JobKeeper Payment (JKP) Calculate Top-up /Stand-down and Send Start-Up – Top-Up & Finish JKP allowances to ATO Corrections to JobKeeper Finish allowance if required Seamless automation for inclusions and exclusions of earnings and retro catch-up payments Tailored for individual entities where applicable Tailored for weekly, fortnightly and monthly pay cycle.
